dial_hist:

# System: "I found two 2-star hotels in the north area of Cambridge with free parking and free wifi: Ashley Hotel and Lovell Lodge. Would you like to book one of these, or do you need more information about either?"

# System: "I will check if I can retrieve detailed information about room amenities and cancellation policies for Ashley Hotel and Lovell Lodge. Please hold on a moment."

If you want, I can help you book one of the hotels based on the available information."
